front.title: Multicast-only Fast Reroute Based on Topology Independent Loop-free Alternate Fast Reroute

abstract.t: Multicast-only Fast Reroute (MoFRR) has been defined in RFC7431, but the selection of the secondary multicast next hop depends on the loop-free alternate fast reroute, which has restrictions in multicast deployments. This document describes a mechanism for Multicast-only Fast Reroute by using Topology Independent Loop-free Alternate fast reroute, which is independent of network topology and can achieve the coverage of more network environments.
